headline: P&L exposure: ₹583 Cr direct settlement (engine estimate) + ₹402.3 Cr cascading legal, regulatory, and reputational costs (engine estimate) (of ₹985.3 Cr canonical event exposure)
what_matters: P/E compression of 0.1x expected; margin erosion of 220.8 bps; revenue at risk totals ₹72.9 Cr (engine estimate) due to customer attrition and lost trust.
Cost of capital likely to rise by 20-40 bps as per BRSR-triggered SEBI scrutiny; potential for bond spread widening and ESG fund outflows.

Triggers BRSR, GRI:205 (rationale: Triggered by any fraud disclosure, bribery allegation, insider trading investigation, or ED/CBI action. Also referenced for ISO 37001 certification.)/207, COSO ERM, and ESRS G1; SEBI may impose trading restrictions and penalties; regulatory deadlines for enhanced disclosures imminent.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹583 Cr direct settlement (engine estimate) + ₹402.3 Cr cascading legal, regulatory, and reputational costs (engine estimate) (of ₹985.3 Cr canonical event exposure)
Revenue at risk: ₹72.9 Cr indirect revenue loss (engine estimate)
